public void initializeScreen() { DataRow dr = QuickPartDt.NewRow(); dr["Seq"] = 1; dr["TypeCode"] = "Purchased"; // Purchased as Default dr["MinOnHand"] = 0.00; dr["MaxOnHand"] = 0.00; dr["UnitCost"] = 0.00; dr["Multiples"] = 0.00; dr["LeadTime"] = 0; dr["PlanningTime"] = 0.00; dr["DaysofSupply"] = 0; dr["RsinDelta"] = 0; dr["RsOutDelta"] = 0; dr["SalesCurrency"] = 0; dr["SalesPriceEuro"] = 0; QuickPartDt.Rows.Add(dr); oTrans.NotifyAll(EpiTransaction.NotifyType.Initialize, this.CustomView);
setUDCodeDefaults(); }

if (UD01Form.LaunchFormOptions != null && UD01Form.LaunchFormOptions.CallBackMethod != null) UD01Form.LaunchFormOptions.CallBackMethod(oTrans, CustomView.dataView.Table.Rows[0]["PartNum"].ToString());
UD01Form.Close(); }

}

private void getDefaultPriceLists() { var whereClauseUDCodeType = "CodeTypeID = 'PartParams'"; var whereClauseUDCodes1 = "CodeID = 'PriceLstID'"; var whereClauseUDCodes2 = "CodeID = '2ndPriceLs'";
getDefaultPrices(whereClauseUDCodeType, whereClauseUDCodes1, "PriceList"); getDefaultPrices(whereClauseUDCodeType, whereClauseUDCodes2, "SecondaryPriceList");
}
private void getDefaultPrices(string whereClauseUDCodeType, string whereClauseUDCodes, string columnName) { string priceList; Ice.Adapters.UserCodesAdapter userCodeAdapter = new Ice.Adapters.UserCodesAdapter(oTrans); userCodeAdapter.BOConnect();
var wc = string.Format("{0} and {1}", whereClauseUDCodeType, whereClauseUDCodes);
System.Collections.Hashtable wcs = new Hashtable(1); wcs.Add("UDCodes", wc);
Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchOptions searchOpts = Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchOptions.CreateRuntimeSearch(wcs, Ice.Lib.Searches.DataSetMode.RowsDataSet);
userCodeAdapter.InvokeSearch(searchOpts); if (userCodeAdapter.UserCodesData.UDCodes.Count > 0) { priceList = userCodeAdapter.UserCodesData.UDCodes[0]["CodeDesc"].ToString(); var currRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow; currRow.BeginEdit(); currRow[columnName] = priceList; currRow.EndEdit(); } }
private void createPart() { partAdapter.GetNewPart(); var drPart = partAdapter.PartData.Part.Rows[0]; drPart["PartNum"] = QuickPartEntryProc;
DataRow drScreen = CustomView.dataView.Table.Rows[0]; DataRow drBPMData = edvCallContextBpmData.dataView.Table.Rows[0];
string typeCode = string.Empty; if(drScreen["TypeCode"].ToString() == "Manufactured") typeCode = "M"; if(drScreen["TypeCode"].ToString() == "Purchased") typeCode = "P"; if(drScreen["TypeCode"].ToString() == "Sales Kit") typeCode = "K";
drBPMData[BPMData_ProcessKey] = QuickPartEntryProc; drBPMData[BPMData_PartNum] = drScreen["PartNum"]; drBPMData[BPMData_PartDescription] = drScreen["PartDescription"]; drBPMData[BPMData_TypeCode] = typeCode; drBPMData[BPMData_UOMClassID] = drScreen["UOMClassID"]; drBPMData[BPMData_IUM] = drScreen["IUM"]; drBPMData[BPMData_SalesUM] = drScreen["SalesUM"]; drBPMData[BPMData_PUM] = drScreen["PUM"]; drBPMData[BPMData_ClassId] = drScreen["ClassID"]; drBPMData[BPMData_ProdCode] = drScreen["ProdCode"]; drBPMData[BPMData_SearchWord] = drScreen["SearchWord"]; drBPMData[BPMData_VendorID] = drScreen["VendorID"]; drBPMData[BPMData_VendPartNum] = drScreen["SuppPartNum"]; drBPMData[BPMData_Cost] = drScreen["UnitCost"]; drBPMData[BPMData_PrimWhse] = drScreen["PrimWhse"]; drBPMData[BPMData_PrimBin] = drScreen["PrimBinNum"]; drBPMData[BPMData_MinimumQty] = drScreen["MinOnHand"]; drBPMData[BPMData_MaximumQty] = drScreen["MaxOnHand"]; drBPMData[BPMData_UrgentMultQty] = drScreen["Multiples"]; drBPMData[BPMData_LeadTime] = drScreen["LeadTime"]; drBPMData[BPMData_PlanTimeFence] = drScreen["PlanningTime"]; drBPMData[BPMData_DaysOfSupply] = drScreen["DaysofSupply"]; drBPMData[BPMData_ReschedInDelta] = drScreen["RsinDelta"]; drBPMData[BPMData_ReschedOutDelta] = drScreen["RsOutDelta"]; drBPMData[BPMData_BaseUnitPrice] = drScreen["SalesCurrency"]; drBPMData[BPMData_SecondCurrencyUnitPrice] = drScreen["SalesPriceEuro"]; drBPMData[BPMData_CommodityCode] = drScreen["CommodityCode"]; drBPMData[BPMData_PriceList] = drScreen["PriceList"]; drBPMData[BPMData_SecondaryPriceList] = drScreen["SecondaryPriceList"]; //drBPMData[BPMData_SupplierCurrency] = drScreen["SuppCurrency"];
partAdapter.GetCodeDescList("","");
}
private void CreateRowRuleCustomViewPrimWhseEquals_Constant_NullValue() { // Description: disableBin // **** begin autogenerated code **** ControlSettings controlSettings1EpiReadOnly = new ControlSettings(); controlSettings1EpiReadOnly.SetStyleSetName("EpiReadOnly"); RuleAction epireadonlyCustomView_PrimBinNum = RuleAction.AddControlSettings(this.oTrans, "CustomView.PrimBinNum", controlSettings1EpiReadOnly); RuleAction disabledCustomView_PrimBinNum = RuleAction.AddControlSettings(this.oTrans, "CustomView.btnPrimBinNum", SettingStyle.Disabled);

}
private void QuickPart_AfterFieldChange(object sender, DataColumnChangeEventArgs args) { // ** Argument Properties and Uses ** // args.Row["FieldName"] // args.Column, args.ProposedValue, args.Row // Add Event Handler Code var currRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow;
if(currRow == null) return;
currRow.EndEdit();
switch (args.Column.ColumnName) { case "PrimWhse":
currRow.BeginEdit(); currRow["PrimBinNum"] = string.Empty; currRow.EndEdit();
break; case "UOMClassID":
SearchOnUOMClassAdapter(currRow["UOMClassID"].ToString());
break; case "PartDescription":
currRow.BeginEdit(); if(currRow["PartDescription"].ToString().Length > 8) currRow["SearchWord"] = currRow["PartDescription"].ToString().Substring(0,8); else currRow["SearchWord"] = currRow["PartDescription"].ToString(); currRow.EndEdit();
break; case "VendorID": SearchOnCurrency(); break; } }
private void SearchOnUOMClassAdapter(string UOMClassID) { // Wizard Generated Search Method // You will need to call this method from another method in custom code // For example, [Form]_Load or [Button]_Click
bool recSelected; string whereClause = string.Format("UOMClassID = '{0}'", UOMClassID); System.Data.DataSet dsUOMClassAdapter = Ice.UI.FormFunctions.SearchFunctions.listLookup(this.oTrans, "UOMClassAdapter", out recSelected, false, whereClause);
System.Data.DataRow edvCustomViewRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow; if (recSelected) { System.Data.DataRow adapterRow = dsUOMClassAdapter.Tables[0].Rows[0];
// Map Search Fields to Application Fields
if ((edvCustomViewRow != null)) { edvCustomViewRow.BeginEdit(); edvCustomViewRow["SalesUM"] = adapterRow["DefUomCode"]; edvCustomViewRow["IUM"] = adapterRow["DefUomCode"]; edvCustomViewRow["PUM"] = adapterRow["DefUomCode"]; edvCustomViewRow.EndEdit(); } } else { edvCustomViewRow.BeginEdit(); edvCustomViewRow["SalesUM"] = string.Empty; edvCustomViewRow["IUM"] = string.Empty; edvCustomViewRow["PUM"] = string.Empty; edvCustomViewRow.EndEdit(); } }
private void btnBin_Click(object sender, System.EventArgs args) { // ** Place Event Handling Code Here ** SearchOnWhseBinAdapterShowDialog(); }
private void SearchOnWhseBinAdapterShowDialog() { // Wizard Generated Search Method // You will need to call this method from another method in custom code // For example, [Form]_Load or [Button]_Click
bool recSelected;
System.Data.DataRow edvCustomViewRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow; if ((edvCustomViewRow != null)) { string whereClause = string.Format("WarehouseCode = '{0}'", edvCustomViewRow["PrimWhse"].ToString()); System.Data.DataSet dsWhseBinAdapter = Ice.UI.FormFunctions.SearchFunctions.listLookup(this.oTrans, "WhseBinAdapter", out recSelected, true, whereClause); if (recSelected) { System.Data.DataRow adapterRow = dsWhseBinAdapter.Tables[0].Rows[0];
// Map Search Fields to Application Fields edvCustomViewRow.BeginEdit(); edvCustomViewRow["PrimBinNum"] = adapterRow["BinNum"]; edvCustomViewRow.EndEdit(); cmbPrimBin.ForceRefreshList(); } } }
private void setUDCodeDefaults() { System.Data.DataRow edvCustomViewRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow;
var dtParams = getUserCodesDataTable(UDParamsID);
if(dtParams == null) return;
// Days Of Supply var res = dtParams.Select("CodeID = 'DaysSupply'"); if(res.Length > 0) edvCustomViewRow["DaysofSupply"] = Convert.ToDecimal(res[0]["CodeDesc"]);
// Plan Time Fence res = dtParams.Select("CodeID = 'PlanTime'"); if(res.Length > 0) edvCustomViewRow["PlanningTime"] = Convert.ToDecimal(res[0]["CodeDesc"]);
// Reschedule In Delta res = dtParams.Select("CodeID = 'ResInDelta'"); if(res.Length > 0) edvCustomViewRow["RsinDelta"] = Convert.ToDecimal(res[0]["CodeDesc"]);
// Reschedule Out Delta res = dtParams.Select("CodeID = 'ResOutDelt'"); if(res.Length > 0) edvCustomViewRow["RsOutDelta"] = Convert.ToDecimal(res[0]["CodeDesc"]);
//UOM Class id res = dtParams.Select("CodeID = 'UOMClassID'"); if(res.Length > 0) edvCustomViewRow["UOMClassID"] = res[0]["CodeDesc"].ToString(); }
private DataTable getUserCodesDataTable(string ipCodeTypeID) { Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchOptions opts = new Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchOptions(Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchMode.AutoSearch); opts.DataSetMode = Ice.Lib.Searches.DataSetMode.RowsDataSet; opts.PreLoadSearchFilter = string.Format("CodeTypeID = '{0}'", ipCodeTypeID); DataSet dsPartBin = (DataSet)ProcessCaller.LaunchSearch(oTrans, "UserCodesAdapter", opts);
if(dsPartBin.Tables["UDCodes"].Rows.Count == 0) return null; else return dsPartBin.Tables["UDCodes"]; }
private void getBaseCurrency() { // Wizard Generated Search Method // You will need to call this method from another method in custom code // For example, [Form]_Load or [Button]_Click System.Data.DataRow edvCustomViewRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow;
bool recSelected; string whereClause = "BaseCurr = True"; System.Data.DataSet dsCurrencyAdapter = Ice.UI.FormFunctions.SearchFunctions.listLookup(this.oTrans, "CurrencyAdapter", out recSelected, false, whereClause); if (recSelected) { edvCustomViewRow.BeginEdit(); edvCustomViewRow["BaseCurrency"] = dsCurrencyAdapter.Tables[0].Rows[0]["CurrencyCode"].ToString(); edvCustomViewRow.EndEdit(); } }
private bool isEuroBaseCurrency() { Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchOptions opts = new Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchOptions(Ice.Lib.Searches.SearchMode.AutoSearch); opts.DataSetMode = Ice.Lib.Searches.DataSetMode.ListDataSet; opts.PreLoadSearchFilter = "CurrencyCode = 'EUR' AND BaseCurr = True"; DataSet dsCurr = (DataSet)ProcessCaller.LaunchSearch(oTrans, "CurrencyAdapter", opts);
if(dsCurr != null && dsCurr.Tables[0].Rows.Count > 0) return true;
return false; }
private void SearchOnCurrency() { // Wizard Generated Search Method // You will need to call this method from another method in custom code // For example, [Form]_Load or [Button]_Click System.Data.DataRow edvCustomViewRow = CustomView.CurrentDataRow;
bool recSelected; string whereClause = string.Format("VendorID = '{0}'",edvCustomViewRow["VendorID"].ToString()); System.Data.DataSet dsCurrencyAdapter = Ice.UI.FormFunctions.SearchFunctions.listLookup(this.oTrans, "VendorAdapter", out recSelected, false, whereClause); if (recSelected) { edvCustomViewRow.BeginEdit(); edvCustomViewRow["SuppCurrency"] = dsCurrencyAdapter.Tables[0].Rows[0]["CurrencyCode"].ToString(); edvCustomViewRow.EndEdit(); } } }
